key_findings: Current department general manager (部门总经理) approval threshold for single expense reimbursement is ≥ 10,000 yuan and < 50,000 yuan (AR-03 tier in Annex II of the Authorization Management Rules, doc: 03_authorization_management.md).

The 2025 Expense Reimbursement Rules (01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md) Article 5 (第五条) delegates all approval amount thresholds to the Authorization Management Rules Annex II — no amounts are specified directly in the expense policy text.

The Authorization Management Rules (03_authorization_management.md) Article 2 (第二条) confirms Annex II amounts are the currently effective approval lines. Annex II AR-03 defines the 部门总经理 tier as ≥ 10,000 and < 50,000 yuan.

The 2022 Expense Reimbursement Rules (02_expense_reimbursement_2022_deprecated.md) is explicitly deprecated: Article 1 states it is retained only for historical record; Article 4 states its approval amounts are superseded. The 2025 version Article 14 (第十四条) formally repealed it effective 2025-01-01.
The old 2022 threshold of ≥ 8,000 yuan for department GM approval (02_expense_reimbursement_2022_deprecated.md Article 2) is NOT applicable under current rules.

Both governing documents (01 and 03) are effective January 1, 2025, with no expiry or transition periods. The governing chain is: 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md Art. 5 → 03_authorization_management.md Annex II AR-03.
